mapper.select: SELECT id, run_id, step_id, artifact_type, s3_bucket, s3_key, public_url, mime_type, width, height, size_bytes, sha256, captured_at, created_at FROM artifact WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.run_id, a.step_id, a.artifact_type, a.s3_bucket, a.s3_key, a.public_url, a.mime_type, a.width, a.height, a.size_bytes, a.sha256, a.captured_at, a.created_at FROM checkpoint c JOIN artifact a ON a.source_type = 'RUN' AND a.run_id = c.run_id AND a.artifact_type = 'SCREENSHOT' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jsonb_array_elements_text(c.artifact_refs_jsonb) AS artifact_ref(value) WHERE REPLACE(artifact_ref.value, 'artifact:', '') = a.id::text ) WHERE c.source_type = 'RUN' AND c.run_id = #{runId} AND c.stage = #{stage} ORDER BY a.captured_at DESC, a.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, run_id, step_id, artifact_type, s3_bucket, s3_key, public_url, mime_type, width, height, size_bytes, sha256, captured_at, created_at FROM artifact WHERE source_type = 'RUN' AND run_id = #{runId} AND artifact_type = 'SCREENSHOT' ORDER BY captured_at DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, run_id, step_id, artifact_type, s3_bucket, s3_key, public_url, mime_type, width, height, size_bytes, sha256, captured_at, created_at FROM artifact WHERE source_type = 'RUN' AND run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
